name: Fukiko Ichinomiya
description: A very beautiful girl, unquestioned leader of the Sorority and President of the Student Council. Elegant and refined, Fukiko influences and controls everyone around her, determining their happiness or despair. She has a capricious character, both able of extreme tenderness and chilling wickedness. She seems to have a liking for Nanako (and we'll gradually understand why) and she'll help her become a member of the Sorority, causing a real storm around the young character. Her attitude towards Nan

name: Gojou Sha
description: __Height:__ 184 cm (6'0") Gojyo is a half-demon, made obvious by his red hair and eyes, who loves to gamble and is fond of women looking for a good time. He is often teased by Goku and Sanzo due to his lecherous behavior. However, he is a loyal and reliable friend who will go through extreme lengths for them when the need arises. His weapon in battle is a _shakujou_, a staff with a crescent-moon shaped blade attached to the end by a chain that can be elongated. (Source: Saiyuki.wikia & _Saiyuki

name: Himea Saito
description: Himea is a vampire with great powers and when she meets Taito, she falls in love with him. She puts a curse on him so that he will always be with her, but she is abducted by a strange boy and Taito loses the memories of their encounter for some years due to a spell. Himea fell for Taito, because he was the only one who didn't want her because of her vampire powers. This was probably because Taito didn't know that Himea is a vampire.

name: Hisahito Mizuki
description: He is the star and captain of Seiseki's soccer team. Like Tsukushi, he was a terrible player as a freshman but became an amazing player thanks to extraordinary effort. Now in his final year, he will be joining the Kashima professional soccer team after graduation. He is fond of using neologisms to explain his goals and convey his meaning about plays to the exasperation of most of his team mates.

name: Hiya
mediaTitles: Chillin' in Another World with Level 2 Super Cheat Powers

name: Hokusai Masaki
description: __Height:__ 193 cm A young man with a mysterious atmosphere. He had to experience a lonely childhood because his father was in prison. When he was living on the street, cats started piling up around him, so he became fond of cats. After a certain turmoil, he was picked up by Iori and joined AKYR. Hokusai is often misunderstood, but he has a very gentle and kind-hearted personality.

name: Imhotep
description: A high priest from Ancient Egypt. He's remembered as the Great Heretic who desecrated the creator gods and unleashed a horrible calamity upon the world. After being sealed for millennia, he was revived to rectify his sin by stopping the magai wherever they appear.

name: Jean Valjean
nativeName: ジャン・ヴァルジャン
description: The Mayor of Montrielle-sur-mer, who helped many people in the town. Secretly, an ex-convict, who did forced labour for nineteen years for stealing some bread for his family. After a bishop who he robbed refused to turn him in, and gave him some silver candlesticks on top of the silver plates he had stolen, Jean resolved to do good in the world whenever he can. After he tried to help Cosettes mother, he rescues Cosette from the Therandiers, and raises her as his own daughter.
searchTerms: ジャン・ヴァルジャン

name: Julian Loki
description: __Team:__ Paris X Gen, France National Team, Team World Five (Former) __Position:__ Forward Julian Loki is a young French football prodigy renowned for his exceptional speed and skill. He plays as a forward for the French club Paris X Gen (PXG) and is also a member of the France National Team. First introduced during Third Selection, as a member of the Team World 5, he is initially at Blue Lock to analyze and rate the last string of Blue Lock players. He later returns to help train the Blue Lock

name: Junko Hokaze
description: Hokaze Junko is a third-year student of Tokiwadai Middle School and the most prominent and arguably loyal member of Shokuhou Misaki's clique. She can be described as kind but naive, believing that she can make Misaki and Mikoto get along, as well as being unable to comprehend the lewd nature of Aogami Pierce's conversation regarding his dreams with Misaki and Mikoto. She is also a fan of Gekota. (Source: Toaru Majutsu no Index Wiki, edited)

name: Juzo Megure
description: One of the Chief Inspectors of the police department, Megure is often called upon to conduct the investigations of the various crimes committed around the city. Shortly after Megure had come to the police force, he was involved in a case in which he would meet his future wife, [Midori.](https://anilist.co/character/42218/Midori-Megure) As a result of the case, he has taken to wearing a hat in public in order to hide a scar which he gained and his own self-consciousness about how he came to his m

name: Kabigon
description: Kabigon is a huge, bipedal, dark blue-green Pokémon with a cream-colored face, belly, and feet. Its body is composed of mostly its belly, as its limbs are comparatively small. Its head is large with small, pointed ears and two pointed teeth protruding from its lower jaw. It has round feet, which both have three claws and a circular brown paw pad, and short arms with five claws on each hand. Kabigon's bulk makes it the heaviest Normal type. description: __Height:__ 152 cm (5') __Class:__ 1st Year [Kaito](https://anilist.co/character/47299/Kaito-Kirishima)'s classmate. She seems to have a crush on him, and gets jealous when he talks about other girls.

name: Kiyokazu Fujimoto
description: A blunt, sarcastic young man working at the same kindergarten as Kobato. He is also Kobato's neighbor, living in the same complex under the ownership of Chitose. He has known Sayaka for many years and appears to have strong feelings for her, showing much concern over and being fiercely defensive of her. Upon first meeting Kobato, he is rather suspicious of the unusual girl, as he does not want Sayaka to be hurt by another person. He often pokes fun at and teases Kobato, which is unusual as he ge

name: Klaus
description: **Occupation:** Spy **Affiliation:** Lamplight, Inferno Klaus is one of the main protagonists in the Spy Classroom series. He is the boss of Lamplight and a former member of Inferno, who re-established Lamplight after Inferno was wiped out. Self-proclaimed "the Greatest Spy in the World". Despite being "the Greatest Spy in the World" he is terrible at teaching as he does things intuitively.

name: KOS-MOS
description: **Birth:** T.C. 4765 **Height:** 167 cm KOS-MOS, developed by Kevin Winnicot, KOS-MOS was designed to be the premier Anti-Gnosis weapon. During a rather tragic incident, where KOS-MOS awakened prematurely, she killed Kevin and most of the development team. Shion Uzuki was one of the only survivors at the incident. name: Kouzaburou Arase
description: **Occupation:** Policeman **Affiliation:** Member of Materials Compiling Group No.3. He is a former yakuza who works as a detective for the third Materials Compiling Group of the Shinjuku Police's community safety division.

name: Kuroneko
description: The mysterious employer of the Akudama who speaks through a robotic black cat. They enlist the Akudama to rescue [Cutthroat](https://anilist.co/character/163013/Satsujinki) and later hijack the Shinkansen. ~!They are later revealed to be an immortal boy attempting to—alongside his [sister](https://anilist.co/character/196158/Imouto)—escape their fates as vessels to maintain the Kanto supercomputer.!~

name: Leticia Drakurea
nativeName: レティシア＝ドラクレア
description: She was a former Demon Lord. Black Rabbit says that she is one of the rarest for being a vampire, a pure-blooded vampire at that. Because she's a vampire, she's often called "Knight of Miniature Garden". It's a title earned by what her race have done in the past.
